summary: Visor AI P0 Features Testing Complete - All 25 backend API tests passed. Multi-Model Query Router and Persistent AI Memory features verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Memory extraction runs in background via asyncio.create_task() - tests need 3-4s delay after chat to verify memory updates
Query router patterns are comprehensive but could benefit from unit tests for edge cases
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 features fully tested. Multi-Model Query Router correctly routes: simple queries (Hi, What is SIP?, gold price kya hai?, Thanks) → gpt-4o-mini; complex queries (tax planning, portfolio review, should I invest, suggest) → gpt-5.2; calculator queries → gpt-4o-mini. Persistent AI Memory: GET/DELETE /api/visor-ai/memory endpoints work, memory extracts topics/concerns/facts after chat (wait 3-4s for background task), memory accumulates across conversations. All regression tests pass: chat returns id/content/role/model_used, history and message deletion work.

p0_2_persistent_ai_memory.get_memory_endpoint: PASS - Returns proper structure with topics, concerns, preferences, open_questions, financial_facts, language_preference, conversation_count
p0_2_persistent_ai_memory.delete_memory_endpoint: PASS - Clears all memory, returns confirmation
p0_2_persistent_ai_memory.memory_builds_after_chat: PASS - Memory extracts topics/concerns/facts after conversation
p0_2_persistent_ai_memory.memory_accumulates: PASS - conversation_count increments across multiple chats

regression.chat_returns_proper_fields: PASS - id, content, role, model_used returned

api_response_samples.chat_response: id, user_msg_id, role, content, calculator_result, input_type, created_at, model_used
api_response_samples.memory_response: user_id, topics[], concerns[], preferences[], open_questions[], financial_facts[], language_preference, conversation_count
